title: New harmonic number series
summary: Based on a recent representation of the psi function due to Guillera and Sondow and independently Boyadzhiev, new closed forms for various series involving harmonic numbers and inverse factorials are derived. A high point of the presentation is the rediscovery, by much simpler means, of a famous quadratic Euler sum originally discovered in 1995 by Borwein and Borwein.
